# ComfyUI INSTARAW Dependencies
# Note: torch and numpy are already included with ComfyUI

# API nodes
requests
Pillow

# Mask processing (optional but recommended for GrowMaskWithBlur)
kornia
scipy
tqdm

#google-genai>=1.51.0
google-genai~=1.43.0
google-api-core

# Performance enhancement for model downloads from Hugging Face
huggingface_hub[hf_xet]

onnxruntime

piexif

scikit-image
lpips

pyexiftool
